steps.title: Connect purpose and action
steps.content: Salim wanted to demonstrate the value of revision and encourage audiences to embrace it. Her transparency about revisions and annotations is the result of that purpose and the way she carried it out.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: B signals contrast, C signals replacement, and D only marks a later time. The sentence needs a transition showing that the action logically follows from Salim's goal. The answer is A.
